title: cuscuta epilinum
intro: Cuscuta epilinum, also known as the dodder or Chinese dodder, is a parasitic plant that obtains its nutrients by connecting to the vascular system of its host plants, typically legumes. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Some of the health benefits associated with Cuscuta epilinum include improved kidney function, reduced blood pressure, and enhanced immune system function. In herbal preparations, Cuscuta epilinum is often combined with other plants to create tonics and infusions that support overall health and well-being.
